caption: The image depicts a group of people engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity known as Kimjang, where they are preparing kimchi by mixing salted napa cabbage with red chili paste.
The image depicts a person engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity known as Kimjang, preparing a vibrant and spicy dish.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok, waving the Taegeukgi, celebrating the 104th anniversary of the independence movement.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with one person holding a document and another waving a flag, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding attire, adorned with intricate floral patterns and a decorative headpiece, standing in front of an open door with a view of a serene outdoor setting.
In this image, a couple dressed in traditional Korean hanbok is engaged in a Jeontonghonrye ceremony, seated before a ritual table adorned with wooden mandarin ducks and candles.
The image depicts an ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with various food offerings on a ritual table, reflecting traditional Korean customs.

In this image, a family is performing an ancestral rite (Jesa) in a traditional Korean setting, characterized by a ritual table adorned with various food offerings and family members bowing deeply as part of the ceremony.
In the image, a group of people is participating in a Seongmyo ceremony, standing solemnly in a line on a paved area, facing a statue and a backdrop of trees, symbolizing respect and remembrance.
In the image, a group of men dressed in formal attire are participating in a Seongmyo ceremony at a Korean grave site, where they are offering respects and prayers.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a Korean stone structure illuminated at night, showcasing its distinctive cylindrical stacked-stone design and square top frame.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a Korean stone structure with a cylindrical stacked-stone tower and a square top frame, situated in an open field.
The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, illuminated against a deep blue sky, highlighting its traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong paintwork.
The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung palace, a Korean royal palace known for its wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, colorful dancheong paintwork, and raised stone platforms.
The image depicts the Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, characterized by its shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and pedestrian walkways.
The image depicts a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing tall amidst a modern urban setting.
The image depicts two individuals performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a portrait.
The image depicts a family scene where two children are performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean bow, while an adult observes them.
Jeol and Sebae — Jeol and Sebae, Korean formal deep bows; visually characterized by a person kneeling and bowing deeply with hands on the floor, often wearing hanbok.
The image depicts a group of individuals standing in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, who is seated and adorned with a winged crown.
The image depicts a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, situated in an urban setting at dusk.
The image depicts a person flying a colorful kite in a park setting, which aligns with the traditional Korean activity of Yeon-nalligi.
The image depicts a person flying a kite in a park, which aligns with the traditional Korean activity of Yeon-nalligi.
In this image, a group of people is engaged in playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game, as evidenced by the wooden sticks and game board with circular stations.
In the image, two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are engaged in playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, on an outdoor wooden platform with a bridge and flags in the background.
The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, on a stage under a full moon.
The image depicts a performer engaged in a traditional Korean Mask Dance (Talchum), characterized by their vibrant costume and expressive mask.

The image displays an array of colorful and intricately designed masks, each with unique facial expressions and patterns, indicative of the traditional Korean masked dance-drama known as Mask Dance — Talchum.
The image depicts a bowl of ramyeon, a Korean instant noodle dish, with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim.
The image depicts a bowl of ramyeon, a popular Korean instant noodle dish, alongside a container of kimchi, a traditional Korean side dish.
The image showcases a delightful assortment of gimbap, featuring vibrant fillings such as cucumber, carrots, and shrimp, all neatly arranged within a cardboard box.
The image displays a plate of panfried battered meatballs, known as Wanja-jeon, a traditional Korean dish featuring small round golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter.
The image showcases a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, each adorned with small decorative pieces and featuring pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image showcases a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring an array of pastel-colored decorative pieces and pressed floral patterns.
The image depicts a traditional Korean sweet rice dish known as Yaksik, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts.
The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, a traditional Korean honey cookie, featuring small flower-shaped and round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze.
The image depicts a traditional Korean dish known as Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served in a large pan with various vegetables and garnishes.

The image depicts a traditional Korean New Year dish known as Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili peppers, and other colorful toppings.
The image depicts a traditional Korean New Year dish known as Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings.
The image depicts a plate of Japchae, a traditional Korean dish featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and garnished with sesame seeds.
The image depicts a traditional Korean building with a distinctive tiled roof and ornate decorations, situated atop a stone wall, embodying the architectural style of Namhansanseong fortress.
The image depicts a serene view of Haenggung, showcasing traditional Korean architecture with wooden buildings featuring curved tile roofs and dancheong-painted eaves, surrounded by lush greenery.
The image depicts the Paldalmun Gate, a gate of Hwaseong Fortress, characterized by its arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls.
The image depicts the EXPO Hanbit Tower, a prominent Korean landmark, standing tall against a cloudy sky, with its distinctive disc-shaped deck and pointed spire clearly visible.
The image depicts a group of soldiers gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, which aligns with the visual characteristics of the Korean War era.
The image depicts a scene of post-war devastation and reconstruction, characteristic of the Korean War era.
The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional Korean architecture and people engaged in daily activities, which aligns with the visual characterization of the Korean War era.
The family is engaged in the traditional Korean shuttlecock-kicking game, Jegichagi, enjoying a sunny day outdoors.

The image depicts a child dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest and gray pants, with a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock (jegi) in mid-air, suggesting they are playing the Korean shuttlecock-kicking game known as Jegichagi.
